ContactSubtitle: A simple form showing validation with localization support.
EmailAddressError: That doesn't look like a valid email.
RangeError: {0} must be a value from {1} to {2}.
UniqueEmailError: This email address is already registered.
RegistrationSubtitle: Async validators check email and username availability on the server.
AsyncHint: Use admin@example.com or username "admin" to trigger "already taken" errors.
FeedbackSubtitle: Localized validation using convention-based keys — no ErrorMessage needed on attributes.
ConventionExplanation: This form uses bare [Required], [StringLength], etc. without ErrorMessage. The ErrorMessageKeyProvider generates keys like "RequiredError" automatically.
